A

AcknowledgmentProperties - Class in com.solace.connector.core.properties
Acknowledgment configuration properties.
AcknowledgmentProperties() - Constructor for class com.solace.connector.core.properties.AcknowledgmentProperties
 
ACTIVE_ACTIVE - Enum constant in enum class com.solace.connector.core.properties.LeaderElectionProperties.LeaderElectionMode
A participant in a cluster of connector instances where all instances are active.
ACTIVE_STANDBY - Enum constant in enum class com.solace.connector.core.properties.LeaderElectionProperties.LeaderElectionMode
A participant in a cluster of connector instances where only one instance is active (i.e. the leader), and the others are standby.
after(Message<?>) - Method in interface com.solace.connector.core.customizer.ConsumerBindingMessageInterceptor
Intercept messages after they're handed-off from consumer bindings.
after(Message<?>, boolean, Exception) - Method in interface com.solace.connector.core.customizer.ProducerBindingMessageInterceptor
Intercept messages after they're processed by producer bindings.
AsyncConsumerAcknowledgmentCustomizer - Interface in com.solace.connector.core.customizer
Create a bean of this type to inject a consumer acknowledgement customizer that will be used by the Connector Framework when messages are processed asynchronously.

B

BatchMessageFormat - Interface in com.solace.connector.core.customizer
Interface for defining batch message formats for different binders.
before(Message<?>) - Method in interface com.solace.connector.core.customizer.ProducerBindingMessageInterceptor
Intercept messages before they're handed-off to producer bindings.
binderType() - Method in interface com.solace.connector.core.customizer.AsyncConsumerAcknowledgmentCustomizer
The type of the consumer binder.
binderType() - Method in interface com.solace.connector.core.customizer.BatchMessageFormat
The type of the binder.
binderType() - Method in interface com.solace.connector.core.customizer.PublishAcknowledgmentProvider
The type of the publishing binder.

C

com.solace.connector.core.customizer - package com.solace.connector.core.customizer
Beans and components to customize the various aspects of the Micro-Integration framework for vendor-specific features and behaviors.
com.solace.connector.core.properties - package com.solace.connector.core.properties
General configuration properties for the Micro-Integration Framework.
com.solace.connector.core.transform.platform.customizer - package com.solace.connector.core.transform.platform.customizer
Beans and components to customize the Micro-Integration framework's transformation capabilities to be able to interpret and handle vendor-specific types.
com.solace.connector.core.transform.platform.properties - package com.solace.connector.core.transform.platform.properties
Configuration properties for the Micro-Integration's Message Transform Platform.
ConfigurationValidation - Interface in com.solace.connector.core.customizer
Provide a Bean of this type to validate the compatibility of user configurations across different components within a workflow.
ConnectorManagementProperties - Class in com.solace.connector.core.properties
Connector management configuration properties.
ConnectorManagementProperties() - Constructor for class com.solace.connector.core.properties.ConnectorManagementProperties
 
ConnectorProperties - Class in com.solace.connector.core.properties
Connector configuration properties.

ConnectorSecurityProperties - Class in com.solace.connector.core.properties
Connector security configuration properties.

ConnectorSecurityProperties.User - Class in com.solace.connector.core.properties
 
ConnectorTransformIndexAccessorProvider - Interface in com.solace.connector.core.transform.platform.customizer
Index accessor provider for the message transform feature.
ConnectorTransformPropertyAccessorProvider - Interface in com.solace.connector.core.transform.platform.customizer
Property accessor provider for the message transform feature.
ConstrainedReflectivePropertyAccessor - Class in com.solace.connector.core.transform.platform.customizer
A reflective property accessor that only allows access to a specific method on a specific type.
ConstrainedReflectivePropertyAccessor(Class<?>, Class<?>, String) - Constructor for class com.solace.connector.core.transform.platform.customizer.ConstrainedReflectivePropertyAccessor
Create a new instance for the given target type and read method name.
ConstrainedReflectivePropertyAccessor(Class<?>, Class<?>, String, String) - Constructor for class com.solace.connector.core.transform.platform.customizer.ConstrainedReflectivePropertyAccessor
Create a new instance for the given target type, read method name, and write method name.
ConsumerBinding - Class in com.solace.connector.core.customizer
Represents a consumer binding configuration for a specific binder type and destination.
ConsumerBinding(String, String, ConsumerProperties) - Constructor for class com.solace.connector.core.customizer.ConsumerBinding
 
ConsumerBindingMessageInterceptor - Interface in com.solace.connector.core.customizer
Binding interceptor for consumer bindings.
ConsumerBindingMessageInterceptorFactory - Interface in com.solace.connector.core.customizer
Factory for creating binding-specific ConsumerBindingMessageInterceptor instances.
ConvertibleTypePair - Record Class in com.solace.connector.core.transform.platform.customizer
A pair of types that can be converted from one to another.
ConvertibleTypePair(TypeDescriptor, TypeDescriptor) - Constructor for record class com.solace.connector.core.transform.platform.customizer.ConvertibleTypePair
Creates an instance of a ConvertibleTypePair record class.
createFuture(MessageHeaderAccessor, Object) - Method in interface com.solace.connector.core.customizer.PublishAcknowledgmentProvider
Create a CompletableFuture to indicate when a published message has been successfully/unsuccessfully delivered.
createIfNecessary(String, ConsumerProperties) - Method in interface com.solace.connector.core.customizer.ConsumerBindingMessageInterceptorFactory
Creates an interceptor instance for the specified binding, or null if not needed.
createIfNecessary(String, ProducerProperties) - Method in interface com.solace.connector.core.customizer.ProducerBindingMessageInterceptorFactory
Creates an interceptor instance for the specified binding, or null if not needed.

D

doAck(AcknowledgmentCallback) - Method in interface com.solace.connector.core.customizer.AsyncConsumerAcknowledgmentCustomizer
A means for customizing how consumer messages are acknowledged for a given binder.
doNack(AcknowledgmentCallback, Throwable) - Method in interface com.solace.connector.core.customizer.AsyncConsumerAcknowledgmentCustomizer
A means for customizing how consumer messages are negatively acknowledged for a given binder.

equals(Object) - Method in record class com.solace.connector.core.transform.platform.customizer.ConvertibleTypePair
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

Represents the binding information for a producer in a Solace binder.

PublishAcknowledgmentProvider - Interface in com.solace.connector.core.customizer
Create this as a bean to inject a custom provider that will be used to notify the Connector Framework of when messages have been successfully/unsuccessfully published.
